html:
Exclusive to:

A Boat Lantern is a craftable Boat attachment in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 1 Empty Bottle, 2 Twigs, and 1 Firefly to craft, and can be found in the Light Tab. It is also a reward from the Yaarctopus in exchange for Surf 'n' Turf.

The Boat Lantern needs to be attached to a boat to function. When it is attached to a Boat, it can be turned on or off at will, and provides light when turned on, protecting the player from Charlie. It has a limited durability and will eventually run out if kept on, but it can be refilled with Bioluminescence or Fireflies to extend its lifespan.

Tips

  • The Slot Machine may occasionally drop Fireflies, turning it into a unreliable way to obtain Fireflies, if one has enough Dubloons and luck.
  • If playing in a Shipwrecked world that has been connected with a base game world, Light Bulbs can be used to recharge the Boat Lantern.

Gallery

  • Boat Lantern as seen in the Shipwrecked trailer.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Boat Lantern
"Shed some light on the situation."
×1 ×2 ×1
Tab
Tier
7 min 48 sec
Does not stack
Perk
Boat attachment; provides light source
Dropped by
(exchanged for )
"boat_lantern"
“This will do wonders for my nightvision!”
–Wilson
“Light without a flame. I don't like it one bit.”
–Willow
“Is safer light.”
–Wolfgang
“To see the vast nothingness in the black of night.”
–Wendy
“SEE THE SEA AT NIGHT”
–WX-78
“My oceanic night light.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a boat light.”
–Woodie
“It lends an eerie glow to all around it.”
–Maxwell
“An exemplary application for bioluminescence.”
–Wagstaff
“See me, föul beasts öf the shadöw seas!”
–Wigfrid
“Seeing where we're going is sure handy!”
–Webber
“Night-surfing. I love it!”
–Walani
“To "sea" what's coming!”
–Warly
“Fer night sails.”
–Woodlegs
“LIGHT O' THE BOATS”
–Wilba
“Floaty light”
–Wormwood
“I could've used one of these for my balloon.”
–Wheeler
A Boat Lantern is a craftable Boat attachment in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and 1 Empty Bottle, 2 Twigs, and 1 Firefly to craft, and can be found in the Light Tab. It is also a reward from the Yaarctopus in exchange for Surf 'n' Turf.
The Boat Lantern needs to be attached to a boat to function. When it is attached to a Boat, it can be turned on or off at will, and provides light when turned on, protecting the player from Charlie. It has a limited durability and will eventually run out if kept on, but it can be refilled with Bioluminescence or Fireflies to extend its lifespan.
Tips[edit | edit source]
The Slot Machine may occasionally drop Fireflies, turning it into a unreliable way to obtain Fireflies, if one has enough Dubloons and luck.
If playing in a Shipwrecked world that has been connected with a base game world, Light Bulbs can be used to recharge the Boat Lantern.

It requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype and 1 [[Empty Bottle]], 2 [[Twigs]], and 1 [[Fireflies|Firefly]] to craft, and can be found in the [[Light Tab]]. It is also a reward from the [[Yaarctopus]] in exchange for [[Surf 'n' Turf]]. The Boat Lantern needs to be attached to a boat to function. When it is attached to a Boat, it can be turned on or off at will, and provides light when turned on, protecting the player from [[Charlie]]. It has a limited durability and will eventually run out if kept on, but it can be refilled with [[Bioluminescence]] or Fireflies to extend its lifespan. == {{Pic|32|Prototype}}Tips == * The [[Slot Machine]] may occasionally drop Fireflies, turning it into a unreliable way to obtain Fireflies, if one has enough [[Dubloons]] and luck. * If playing in a ''Shipwrecked'' world that has been connected with a base game world, [[Light Bulb]]s can be used to recharge the Boat Lantern. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Woodlegs_and_Tiger_Shark_at_Night_Trailer.jpg|Boat Lantern as seen in the ''Shipwrecked'' trailer.
